tasks.title: Fix RLS: monteur can access filled project detail
tasks.description: Create migration 013_rls_projects_accepted_editor.sql. Current policy (008) allows SELECT only when status='published' OR creator_id=auth.uid(). Replace with policy that also allows: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM contact_requests WHERE project_id=projects.id AND editor_id=auth.uid() AND status='accepted'). This unblocks editors from viewing project details after a project is filled.

tasks.title: Editor sees project title instead of creator name in conversation list
tasks.description: In MessagingHub.jsx line 115, otherName for editor role currently shows creator_name. When request has a project_id, show the project title instead. Need to enrich requests with project titles — either join via project_id or batch-fetch. Add fallback to creator_name when no project. ChatView header (lines 57-59) has the code but it currently fails because the Supabase query to fetch project title is blocked by RLS on filled projects — verify the header works once T001 (RLS fix) is applied, and if the fetch still fails for other reasons, fix it. Also check chat bubbles for any sender attribution that should show project context.

tasks.title: Remove 'pré-rempli depuis le projet' banner from OfferForm
tasks.description: Delete the banner block at OfferForm.jsx lines 136-140 and remove the projectLoaded useState (line 45). Replace the projectLoaded guard in the prefill useEffect (line 48) with a ref (e.g. prefillDone) to prevent re-fetching without polluting JSX. Update the useEffect dependency array accordingly. The prefill logic itself (lines 57-73) stays intact.

tasks.title: Show round events (revisions, validations) in chat timeline
tasks.description: Extend ChatView.jsx timeline useMemo (lines 62-65) to include deliverable_rounds from CollabContext. Add _type:'round_event' entries sorted by created_at alongside messages and offers. Create new component src/components/messaging/RoundEventBubble.jsx rendering system-style messages: revision requests show creator feedback, validations show 'Livrables vX validés', deliverable submissions show 'Livrables vX envoyés'. Style as centered, muted system messages distinct from chat bubbles and offer cards.

tasks.title: Prominent 'Clore le projet' button for creator
tasks.description: In CollabTracker.jsx, the 'Mettre fin au projet' button (lines 507-521) only shows in feedback step after review. Extend: (1) Show in both feedback and closed steps, regardless of review status (creator only). (2) Use existing CollabContext.closeProject() (lines 334-360) — sets project status='completed' + notifies. (3) After close action, display 'Projet clôturé' state in tracker instead of button. No new DB status needed — 'completed' is sufficient.

tasks.title: Verify and fix offer prefill for editor role
tasks.description: The prefill useEffect in OfferForm.jsx (lines 47-75) triggers on request?.project_id — not role-specific. Verify it works when an editor clicks 'Proposer une offre' from CollabTracker. Check: (1) Does editor's request carry project_id? (2) Does the project fetch succeed? (3) Are all mapped fields relevant for editor proposals? Fix if needed, otherwise verify and close.

tasks.title: Validated deliverables section in CollabTracker sidebar
tasks.description: In CollabTracker.jsx, add a 'Livrables validés' section listing rounds with status='validated' and their download links. Place after existing rounds display. Each item: checkmark + 'vX' label + validation date + clickable link (round.deliverable_link). Only show when >= 1 validated round.

tasks.title: Edit offer (modify instead of cancel-only)
tasks.description: Add edit mode to OfferForm.jsx via ?edit=<offer_id> query param. When present: (1) fetch existing offer and prefill form, (2) on submit UPDATE in-place (not create new), (3) notify receiver 'L'offre a été modifiée'. In CollabTracker.jsx, add 'Modifier' button next to cancel in offer_sent step — navigates to /offer/new?edit=<offer_id>&request=<request_id>. Add editOffer() in CollabContext.jsx that does the UPDATE + notification.
